title: GMT-Discontented
description: Magic and Growth, oh I wish time was moving slower...
body:
This mod is a prototype for project it is public but will not remain for long as some stuff will be kept private due to NDA's

Here may be dragons ! 

What do i have planned for it ? 

Phase 1: Fixing the Ether and names, basically the Vanilla+ feature such as the new mineral Ether and Mithril

Phase 2: Will be focused around features. Such as the first dimension of the mod and also the magical system ( that is currently into "working" )

Phase 3: The addition of the stats system and also race system.


Note to reader: The mod require Geckolib ! No i will not backport the mod to earlier version
( It maybe planned in the futur but not at the moment. )
The mod does not have everything cited above **_Yet_**, be patient and feel free to share your wisdom to guide your humble traveller journey
